manifest.name: Color cycler

name: Color cycler

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixes an issue where the plugin wouldn't load on a fresh install.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This version introduces the ability to add unique color cycler settings for dark and light themes!

- Added setting to split settings into light and dark themes
- Updated UI to support separate light and dark theme settings
- Added setting to cycle color when the vault loads
- Various bug fixes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Remove ribbon icon show/hide setting as this functionality already exists in Obsidian

releases.description: Small tweaks to manifest and modal headers

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Update manifest to meet submission criteria

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bug fixes:
- throttle settings saves when using the timer to avoid spamming sync
- reset the timer when manually cycling the color

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release of version 1.

Includes:
- Ribbon icon
- `Cycle accent color` command
- Increment behavior
- Random behavior
- Preset behavior
- Timer
- HSL status bar indicator
